title: Immunohistochemistry free-floating rat brain cryosections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fjcgb","text":"Protocol for  immunohistochemistry on rat brain cryosections ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6na58","text":"Reagents:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fout7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ngt8","text":"- Phosphate buffer solution (PB)1X.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eu76u","text":"- TritonX-100","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"267a0","text":"- Endogenous peroxidase blocking solution: PB 1x + 3% H2O2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":55,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":57,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"en2se","text":"- Blocking Buffer: PB 1X + 10% NGS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2vddh","text":"- 1st Ab : Diluted in1X PBS +5% NGS+ 0.3% TX","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"evffl","text":"- 2nd Ab : Diluted in1X PBS +5% NGS+ 0.3% TX","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"26e4g","text":"- 3,30-diaminobenzidine (DAB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c0hme","text":"- Xilen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b3a5g","text":"- Ethanol : 100%, 95%, 70%, 50%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect the cryosections needed for a caudo-rostral representation of each brain region (every fifth or sith sections depending on the section's thickness, brain region, and animal species) into a 24-well-plate (3-4 sections per well)
Incubate sections with endogenous peroxidase blocking solution: PB1X + 3% H 2 O 2 (500 µ l/well) for at RT
Wash in PB1X 3 times x 5 min (500 ul) at RT
Wash in PB1X 2 times x 5 min (500 ul) at RT
Incubate with blocking solution (500 µ l/well) : PB1X + 10%NGS (serum from the same species as the host of the secondary antibody) + 0.3% TritonX-100, at RT
Remove the blocking solution and incubate sections with PB1X+ 5%NGS+0.3% TritonX-100+ primary Ab (500 µ l/well) for 24/72 h, depending on the Ab, at +4°C
Wash in PB1X 3 times x 5 min (500 ul) at RT
Incubate sections with adequate secondary biotinylated Ab diluted in PB1X+ 0.3% TritonX-100, at RT
Wash n PB1X 3 times x 5 min (500 ul) at RT
Incubate with Extravidin-peroxidase buffer solution diluited in PB1X+0.3% TritonX-100, at RT
Wash n PB1X 3 times x 5 min (500 ul) at RT
Allow each DAB tablet to reach room temperature before use and Dissolve a DAB tablet in 15 mL of Tris-buffered saline, pH 7.6
Add 12 µL of fresh 30% hydrogen peroxide prior to use
Filter the solution through a 0.2 µm filter immediately before use
Add 500 µl/ well of substrate solution in the dark
Remove and clean al material with bleach
Wash 2 times x 5 min in PB1x
Mount sections on SuperFrost plus slides and let it dry overnight
Dehydrate in consecutive steps of ethanol solutions (50%, 70%, 95%, 100%)
Incubate slides in 2 times x 5 min in Xylene
Coverslip slides with mounting medium, remove bubbles if any, and let dry
creator: Mariangela Massaro Cenere
